title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Matira, Rn; (3) Christopher P. Juliano, Rn; (4) Julienne C. Urbano, Rn; (5) Bernie Florante B. Cadiz, Rn; and (6) Daryl Hannah C. Dimapilis, Rn; (7) Jessamine B. Naquila,rn with Monthly Compensation of Seventeen Thousand Six Hundred Eighty Pesos (P 17,680.00)
